meanings.definition: a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss
examples: each hair consists of layers of dead keratinized cells

meanings.definition: a very small distance or space
examples: they lost the election by a whisker

meanings.definition: filamentous hairlike growth on a plant
any of the cylindrical filaments characteristically growing from the epidermis of a mammal
examples: there is a hair in my soup

meanings.definition: cloth woven from horsehair or camelhair; used for upholstery or stiffening in garments
a filamentous projection or process on an organism
